---
title: "About Me"
---

::: {.hero}

::: {.hero-text}

# Nutchanon Chaiyaratana

### Applied Business Analytics | Business Operations | Data-Driven Decision Making

I am a graduate student in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University Metropolitan College. Before coming to Boston, I studied accounting and worked in internal audit, KYC audit support, ERP implementation, and school operations digitization in Thailand. My background helps me understand both business operations and data-driven problem solving, and I am continuing to build skills in Python, SQL, R, Tableau, GitHub, and AWS.

::: {.hero-buttons}
[Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[CV](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Contact](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

:::

::: {.hero-image}

![](assets/profile.jpg)

:::


:::

## Experience Journey

::: {.timeline-hover}

::: {.timeline-item}
**2014–2018**

### Bachelor of Business Administration in Accounting

::: {.timeline-detail}
**Kasetsart University — Bangkok, Thailand**  
Built a foundation in accounting, finance, business operations, and analytical thinking.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**2018–2020**

### Internal Auditor, SAS-AML Team

::: {.timeline-detail}
**Bangkok Bank — Bangkok, Thailand**  
Worked on AML/KYC audit support, customer information system validation, credit card audit planning, and fraud-risk review.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**2021–2025**

### Digitization Project Manager & Head of Innovation

::: {.timeline-detail}
**Jirasat Wittaya School — Ayutthaya, Thailand**  
Led digitization, ERP implementation, financial record improvement, billing workflow updates, and operational process improvements.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**2025–2026**

### M.S. in Applied Business Analytics

::: {.timeline-detail}
**Boston University — Boston, MA**  
Developing skills in Python, SQL, PySpark, machine learning, forecasting, classification, data visualization, and business analytics.
:::
:::

:::
